untranslatable_reason: Put-call ratio on NDX index options is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal requires a custom put-call ratio metric that is not among the standard technical indicators provided. india_vix is used as a volatility proxy but does not directly measure put-call sentiment.
translation_notes: Signal requires put-call ratio data which is not in the allowed indicator set. Substituted india_vix (or similar volatility index) as a proxy: high values suggest bearish sentiment (go long contrarian), low values suggest bullish sentiment (go short contrarian). However, this is an approximation. The original signal logic cannot be precisely replicated without access to put-call ratio data. Exit condition set to next trading day (hold_days_max=1) per specifications.
